headline.zh-CN: 让仪表盘、通知跳转和曲目问题处理更顺手
headline.en: Makes dashboard, notification routing, and track issue handling smoother

summary.zh-CN: 这次 QoL 更新统一了仪表盘状态卡口径、曲目点击落点和通知中心打开路径，并让曲目详情页可以直接处理问题状态与详情。
summary.en: This QoL update aligns dashboard status-card counts with their filters, unifies track click destinations and notification-center routing, and lets track details handle issue status and detail work in place.

title.zh-CN: 状态卡筛选现在和数字一致
title.en: Status-card filters now match their counts

description.zh-CN: 同行评审卡会同时显示同行评审和同行修订曲目，母带制作卡会同时显示母带、母带修订和终审曲目；当前筛选也会显示可读标签。
description.en: The Peer Flow card now includes both peer review and peer revision tracks, while Mastering Flow includes mastering, mastering revision, and final review tracks. Active filters now show readable labels.

title.zh-CN: 曲目列表点击会直达该处理的工作区
title.en: Track-list clicks now open the right workspace

description.zh-CN: 如果曲目当前有可执行动作，从仪表盘表格或移动卡片打开时会直接进入对应工作流工作区，而不是先落到普通详情页。
description.en: When a track has available actions, opening it from the dashboard table or mobile cards now goes straight to the matching workflow workspace instead of the generic detail page.

title.zh-CN: 曲目详情页可以直接处理问题
title.en: Track details now handle issues in place

description.zh-CN: 问题列表新增快速状态操作；点击问题卡片或波形标记默认在本页抽屉查看详情、回复和改状态，同时保留可切换回旧版独立问题页的本机偏好。
description.en: The issue list now offers quick status actions. Clicking issue cards or waveform markers opens the in-page drawer by default for details, replies, and status changes, while a local preference keeps the legacy standalone issue page available.

title.zh-CN: 快速搜索不再被旧结果覆盖
title.en: Rapid searches no longer get overwritten by stale results

description.zh-CN: 仪表盘和专辑列表现在会忽略过期响应；专辑搜索也加入短暂防抖，减少连续输入时的请求和闪烁。
description.en: Dashboard and album lists now ignore stale responses, and album search uses a short debounce to reduce request noise and visual flicker while typing.

title.zh-CN: 通知中心与顶部铃铛跳转一致
title.en: Notification Center routing now matches the header bell

description.zh-CN: 带曲目上下文的通知会优先打开对应工作流位置，并携带相关问题定位；只有纯问题通知才会进入独立问题页。
description.en: Notifications with track context now open the corresponding workflow location and carry the related issue target. Issue-only notifications still open the standalone issue page.
